contenido.label: Milkshakes
contenido.texto: Choose any flavour of our ice creams or combine up to 2 different flavours to create your perfect milkshake.

contenido.label: Smoothies
contenido.texto: Select from our fresh fruit flavours: Strawberry, Mango, Mixed Berries, Lemon, Pineapple, Watermelon. Mix up to 2 flavours!
Our frappés are made with quality Italian espresso coffee and artisan ice cream. Choose between our classic version with coffee ice cream or the smoother one with vanilla.
